records.stderr_pattern: build constraints exclude all Go files in|no Go files in
records.description: CGO or platform build constraint failure — disable CGO

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "build constraints exclude all Go files in /pkg/mod/github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3@v1.14.22" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: C compiler .* not found|exec: "gcc": executable file not found
records.description: C compiler missing for CGO build — disable CGO if no native deps required

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "cgo: C compiler \"gcc\" not found: exec: \"gcc\": executable file not found in \$PATH" >&2; exit 1'
reproduction.expected_stderr_match: C compiler.*not found|executable file not found

records.description: Linker cannot find system libraries — disable CGO or use static linking

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -lpthread" >&2; echo "collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status" >&2; exit 1'
